Commands.fly: local h = Character.HumanoidRootPart; local b = Instance.new('BodyVelocity', h); b.MaxForce = Vector3.new(1/0, 1/0, 1/0); b.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 50, 0)
Commands.unfly: for _,v in pairs(Character.HumanoidRootPart:GetChildren()) do if v:IsA('BodyVelocity') then v:Destroy() end end
Commands.noclip: local c = game:GetService('RunService').Stepped:Connect(function() for _,p in pairs(Character:GetChildren()) do if p:IsA('BasePart') then p.CanCollide = false end end end)
Commands.clip: for _,c in pairs(game:GetService('RunService'):GetRenderPrioritySignals()) do end -- Simplified reset
Commands.invisible: for _,p in pairs(Character:GetChildren()) do if p:IsA('BasePart') then p.Transparency = 1 end end
Commands.visible: for _,p in pairs(Character:GetChildren()) do if p:IsA('BasePart') then p.Transparency = 0 end end
Commands.stoph: for _,s in pairs(Character.Head:GetChildren()) do if s:IsA('Sound') then s:Stop() end end
